productDisplayName: Fabindia Men Brown Silk Sleeveless Jacket
description: Composition Brown sleeveless ethnic jacket made of silk, has a Nehru collar, full buttoned placket, two insert pockets on the sides with a smaller insert pocket on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only This earthy jacket by fabindia for men is perfect for the artsy intellectual. The superior comfort provided by the silk fabric with a traditional yet fashionable cut makes this a wardrobe essential. Pair this with colourful cotton trousers to go all out and make a colour block statement. For the more conservative, pair it with simple form fitting denims, tees and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
